title: pilosella erecta
intro: Pilosella erecta, also known as Mouse-Ear Hawkweed, is a flowering plant species belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Pilosella erecta include reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and supporting immune function. Pilosella erecta can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for use in traditional medicine, although its effectiveness and safety should be further researched and confirmed by medical professionals.
